{{Infobox character
| name = The Lost Badarin
| aliases = Lost Badarin, Badarin
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[House of Blades (novel)|House of Blades]]
}}

== House of Blades ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[The Lost Badarin]] is a figure from a story who sought a princess in a tower.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c2">''House of Blades'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[The Lost Badarin]] is a character in [[Alin]]'s story.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c2" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin]] used to tell the story of the Lost Badarin.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c25">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
